name_en: Lady's latest 5-compartment bow🎀 Diana bag, crafted from lambskin, a must-have Diana bag for everyone😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence💃🏻, perfect for shoulder or hand carry, exuding femininity. Classic and stylish, a beauty everyone has on Instagram and among fashion icons, don't miss it❤️
